title: Product of Array Except Self
pattern: Array â€” Prefix and Suffix Product Passes
coreIdea: Compute an output array where each element is the product of all other elements, without using division, by combining a left-to-right prefix product pass with a right-to-left suffix product pass.
recognitionCues: asks for product of all elements except self
approach: First pass left to right: result[i] = product of all elements before i (prefix product). Second pass right to left: multiply result[i] by the running suffix product of all elements after i, updating the suffix product as you go.
